metadata.title: Tele-neuropsychology: Validity and Clinical Utility
metadata.description: This pre-print explores the contemporary challenges and controversies surrounding tele-neuropsychology: validity and clinical utility. As neuropsychological assessment evolves, the debate between traditional methods and emerging technologies intensifies. This paper reviews the historical context, current empirical evidence, and future directions for clinical practice, highlighting the need for a balanced approach that integrates technological innovation with psychometric rigor.

metadata.title: Ecological Validity in Neuropsychological Assessment
metadata.description: This pre-print explores the contemporary challenges and controversies surrounding ecological validity in neuropsychological assessment. As neuropsychological assessment evolves, the debate between traditional methods and emerging technologies intensifies. This paper reviews the historical context, current empirical evidence, and future directions for clinical practice, highlighting the need for a balanced approach that integrates technological innovation with psychometric rigor.

metadata.title: Tele-neuropsicología: Validez y Utilidad Clínica
metadata.description: Este pre-print explora los desafíos y controversias contemporáneas en torno a la tele-neuropsicología: validez y utilidad clínica. A medida que la evaluación neuropsicológica evoluciona, el debate entre los métodos tradicionales y las tecnologías emergentes se intensifica. Este documento revisa el contexto histórico, la evidencia empírica actual y las direcciones futuras para la práctica clínica, destacando la necesidad de un enfoque equilibrado que integre la innovación tecnológica con el rigor psicométrico.
